summary: End-to-end regression sweep of Brand/Enterprise portal completed. 27/27 backend API tests passed. UI tests verified all major flows: Auth, Catalog, PDP, Cart, Orders, Account tabs (Overview/Profile/Addresses/Orders/Financials/Activity Ledger), Users, Factories, Allocations, Queries. All core brand-customer paths working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full brand portal regression completed. All flows verified working: (1) Auth with brand_admin role recognition, (2) Catalog with 168 SKUs and all filters (Availability/Category/Composition/Color/Width/GSM), (3) PDP with sample/bulk toggle, color variants, quantity input, balance widgets, (4) Cart with address picker, Send-to-Factory allocation, payment method toggle, (5) Orders page with Documents column (Invoice + E-way buttons), (6) Account Overview with Credit Limit tile (₹3.86L available), Sample Credits tile (192 available), Credit Lines table with FIFO note, Linked Factories section with Demo Factory A, (7) Account Profile/Addresses/Orders/Financials/Activity Ledger tabs all working, (8) Users page with 4 users and Invite button, (9) Factories page with Demo Factory A, (10) Allocations page with pending/accepted/rejected tabs, (11) Queries page with 3 tabs and search.

auth_brand_login.details: Login with brandtest@locofast.com / NewPassword123! works, token persisted, brand_admin role recognized, redirects to /enterprise/fabrics

catalog_fabrics.details: 168 SKUs loaded, filters work (Availability, Category, Composition, Color, Width, GSM), default order_type=sample for brands with sample credits

pdp_fabric_detail.details: Renders fabric details, sample/bulk toggle, quantity input (sample max 5, bulk uses min/max), sample credits balance widget, Add to Cart and Request Quote buttons

rfq_modal_from_pdp.details: Request Quote button opens RFQ modal pre-filled with fabric specs, submits to POST /api/rfq/submit with brand_id stamped

cart_checkout.details: Cart loads contents, displays Sample Requests and Bulk Orders separately, shows credit summary tile, address picker auto-selects default, Add new address toggle works, Send to Factory allocation feature present

account_overview.details: Shows Credit Limit tile (₹3.86L available) + Sample Credits tile (192 available) + Credit Lines table (FIFO note) + sample-credit topup form + Linked Factories Credit section with Demo Factory A

account_profile.details: Read-only fields render, Edit button (admin only) updates name/gst/phone/address via PUT /api/brand/profile

account_addresses.details: Lists own + factory-sourced addresses (factory ones tagged read-only), Add address creates new entry, Set-default works

account_orders.details: Lists samples + bulk separately, each row links to PDP for items

account_financials.details: Shows AM contact card if assigned, 5-tile summary (invoiced/paid/CN/DN/outstanding), invoice list with file_url + eway_bill_url download links, recent activity timeline

account_activity_ledger.details: Per-debit shows linked order_number + product names with PDP deep links

brand_orders_page.details: Renders Documents column with Invoice + E-way buttons (when invoice attached), LF/ORD/002 has both

user_management.details: brand_admin can view team members at /enterprise/users, Invite user button present

factory_management.details: /enterprise/factories shows Demo Factory A with Unverified status, Invite Factory button present

allocations.details: /enterprise/allocations shows SKU allocations to factories with pending/accepted/rejected tabs

topup_flow.details: Sample credit topup create-order endpoint returns valid razorpay_order_id when amount >= 100

queries_portal.details: /enterprise/queries shows 3 tabs (Quotes received/pending/Closed) with counts, search filters work

logout.details: Sign out button present in nav, localStorage cleanup expected on click

mocked_apis.razorpay_verify: Razorpay verify endpoint can't run without real payment - create-order endpoint verified
mocked_apis.resend_email: Email sending via Resend is live but not verified in tests
